summary.targetUserCandidate: small B2B operators using automation workflows
summary.painfulSituation: failed multi-step automations create brittle onboarding workflows and manual spreadsheet reconciliation
summary.promiseCandidate: A lightweight audit trail that flags failed automation runs and turns them into a manual recovery queue.
summary.recommendedNextExperiment: Reply to 10 operators in the source communities and offer a paid manual audit of one broken onboarding workflow.
